label: Apple ID
description: Update the name on your Apple ID, which appears in iCloud, the App Store, FaceTime, and other Apple services.

process.summary: Sign in to appleid.apple.com and update your name in account settings. Alternatively, update on your iPhone or iPad through Settings > your name > Name, Phone Numbers, Email.

steps.description: Go to appleid.apple.com and sign in with your Apple ID. Under Personal Information, click on your name and update it. Click Done.
On iPhone or iPad: go to Settings, tap your name at the top, then tap Name, Phone Numbers, Email. Tap your name to edit it.
steps.note: Your Apple ID email address does not change unless you explicitly update it.

presence_level_content.some_guidance: Quick online update, no documentation needed. Your Apple ID email and any purchases remain unchanged.
